sections.paragraph:
φάτνωμα, ατος, τό (Aristoph; LXX) coffer-work τὰ φατνώματα (παθν-pap) τοῦ ναοῦ ὠλόλυξαν the ornamental panel on the ceiling of the temple broke into lamentation GJs 24:3.—DELG s.v. φάτνη.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1050
